falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes above the 200-day moving average by 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A strong bullish breakout would contradict the current 'HOLD' signal and invalidate the UNKNOWN verdict by indicating a clear trend reversal.
A blowoff score above 60 would indicate a confirmed blowoff top, directly contradicting the current 'HOLD' and UNKNOWN status by signaling a definitive market reversal.

falsification_conditions.condition: Unemployment rate drops below 3.5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sudden drop in unemployment would indicate strong economic growth, invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict by showing a divergence from the historical bottom pattern (which occurred during economic stress).

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
